diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,200 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: './hono', './hono-base', './types', './utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/factory.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createMiddleware and createHandlers for building Hono apps with middleware and handlers
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: './context', './request/constants', './types', './utils/url'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/base.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper extracts route path and matches routes from context
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, UpgradeWebSocket, WSEvents
+- Reads as: './context', './types', './utils/http-status'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/types.ts, src/helper/websocket/websocket.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for Hono with event-driven upgrade and context management
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: './context', './utils/cookie'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/types.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading and setting HTTP cookies including signed cookies for security
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: './client', './client/types', './context', './hono', './types', './utils/types'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creates test clients for Hono apps with custom fetch
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: './context'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/mod.ts
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, etc.) and provides environment variables
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: './helper/html', './jsx/constants', './jsx/dom/css', './utils/html', './css/common.ts'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/css/dom.css.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for server-side CSS with class names, keyframes, and view transitions.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify
+- Reads as: (no reads)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Common utility functions for CSS-in-JS including class name generation, CSS minification, and template processing
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: './http-exception', './utils/headers'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/proxy.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper forwards requests to another origin with header filtering and RFC compliance
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: './hono', './types', './utils/color', './utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev helper displays routes and detects whether handlers are middleware or actual handlers
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: './utils/html'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/html/server.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML helper for templating with automatic escaping and callback support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: ssg, ssGParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: './ssg/ssg.ts', './ssg/middleware', './ssg/plugins'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generator (SSG) helper for static generation of routes to files
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGResult, SSGParams, BeforeRequestHook, AfterResponseHook, AfterGenerateHook, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface
+- Reads as: './client/utils', './hono', './types', './utils/concurrent', './utils/mime', './ssg/middleware', './ssg/plugins', './ssg/utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG logic handles fetching routes, generating HTML, saving files, and running hooks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGParamsMiddleware, AddedSSGDataRequest
+- Reads as: './context', './types', './ssg/utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware provides context detection and parameter injection for static generation
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: './hono', './router', './types', './utils/handler'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for path manipulation, filtering SSG routes, and dynamic route detection
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: './stream/stream', './stream/sse', './stream/text'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper provides stream, SSE, and text streaming APIs for real-time content
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: './context', './utils/stream'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Core streaming API using TransformStream for chunked response delivery
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: './context', './utils/html', './utils/stream', './stream/utils'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming with data, event, id, and retry fields\
